        html {
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
            text-size-adjust: 100%;

        body {
            font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        [x-cloak] {
            display: none !important;
        }

                linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #111827 48%, #1f2937 100%);
        }
